Fixing Audacity Flatpak in Linux Mint

After installing Audacity in Flatpak in Linux Mint (and perhaps in other distros), Audacity won't launch. It just hangs forever. The fix (from here) is to remove "xdg-run/pipewire-0" from the "Filesystem" > "Other files" settings Flatseal:

NOTE: A bunch of links around the site are dead. I'm working on fixing them!
